name: PER_PERSONS
description: This table is new for Fusion, and is created to assist BC4J architecture by providing a non-date tracked parent table to act as the parent for all tables in the Person Model, even PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F itself

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: System-generated primary key column.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: PARTY_ID
columns.Comments: This is obsoleted column

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start date of person record on system, always equal to earliest effective_start_date on per_all_people_f.

columns.Name: CORRESPONDENCE_LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Lookup identifies language to use for this communication.

columns.Name: BLOOD_TYPE
columns.Comments: Identified the blood group of the person.

columns.Name: DATE_OF_BIRTH
columns.Comments: Date of birth of the person.

columns.Name: DATE_OF_DEATH
columns.Comments: Date of death of the person.

columns.Name: COUNTRY_OF_BIRTH
columns.Comments: Identifies the country where the person was born.

columns.Name: REGION_OF_BIRTH
columns.Comments: Region of birth, within the country of birth.

columns.Name: TOWN_OF_BIRTH
columns.Comments: Town of birth, within the region of birth.

columns.Name: USER_GUID
columns.Comments: No longer used

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: CATEGORY_CODE
columns.Comments: Extensible Flexfield Category Code
